title: The Hypnotic Eye
overview: A hosted horror, science fiction movie and television series show, hosted by Icon, the Hypnotic Eye.

episodes.title: Donny at the Rehab
episodes.overview: Icon, the Hypnotic Eye. (voiced by Joe Riley) takes the audience through an eclectic journey of weird and wonderful clips from science fiction, horror and fanciful movies and television shows, old commercials and garage band performances.
